docs.title: Domain 1: Strategy & Governance (738201)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Setting direction and ensuring accountability

Classification: Management Function Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to define its purpose, set strategic direction, govern its operations, manage enterprise-wide performance, and ensure the organisation adapts and transforms to remain competitive. It is the domain where long-term intent is formulated, corporate accountability is established, and enterprise-wide coordination is orchestrated. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, this domain also governs how the blended workforce itself is designed and overseen — ensuring that the human/agent operating model is a deliberate strategic choice, not an emergent accident.

docs.title: ZORBA Hierarchy: Domain → Capability → Process
docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────
Domain         │  Category            │  Major area of enterprise activity
Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 1.1 Define the Business Concept and Long-Term Vision (284713)
docs.text:
Establish the foundational purpose, mission, values, and long-term vision of the enterprise. This capability ensures the organisation has a clearly articulated reason for existing and a compelling picture of its future state.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.1.1 Develop and articulate the enterprise mission and purpose 517342 H — Human-led; agents may research peer missions for benchmarking 1.1.2 Define and codify organisational values and principles 842156 H — Human-led; values require authentic human deliberation 1.1.3 Formulate the long-term vision and strategic ambition 394028 H+a — Human-led with agent scenario modelling and trend analysis 1.1.4 Communicate vision and purpose across the enterprise 651873 H=A — Agents generate communications; humans approve and personalise 1.1.5 Review and refresh the business concept periodically 923467 H+a — Agents monitor market shifts and trigger review cycles

docs.title: 1.2 Develop and Manage Enterprise Strategy (156489)
docs.text:
Translate the long-term vision into a coherent strategic plan that defines where the enterprise will compete, how it will win, and what capabilities it requires. This includes environmental analysis, strategic option evaluation, and strategy documentation.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.2.1 Conduct environmental and market analysis 308741 h+A — Agent-heavy; agents scan, synthesise, and present; humans interpret 1.2.2 Assess internal capabilities and strategic readiness 762514 H=A — Agents map capabilities and gaps; humans validate and prioritise 1.2.3 Identify and evaluate strategic options 439286 H+a — Agents model scenarios and outcomes; humans judge and decide 1.2.4 Select and commit to strategic direction 185673 H — Human decision; agents provide decision-support artefacts 1.2.5 Document and formalise the strategic plan 624831 h+A — Agents draft; humans review, refine, and approve 1.2.6 Cascade strategy across organisational units and domains 571948 H=A — Agents distribute and track acknowledgement; humans contextualise for their teams 1.2.7 Monitor strategic assumptions and trigger strategy refresh 893215 A — Agents continuously monitor assumptions; alert humans when conditions change

docs.title: 1.3 Manage Strategic Planning Cycles and Cadences (472053)
docs.text:
Define and operate the rhythms through which strategy is planned, reviewed, and refreshed — including annual planning cycles, quarterly reviews, and event-driven strategic responses.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.3.1 Define the strategic planning calendar and milestones 341679 H+a — Humans set cadences; agents schedule and track 1.3.2 Coordinate cross-functional input to strategic planning 728463 H=A — Agents orchestrate collection; humans contribute substance 1.3.3 Facilitate strategic review sessions 514927 H+a — Agents prepare briefing packs; humans facilitate discussion 1.3.4 Manage the transition from planning to execution 896234 H=A — Agents translate strategy into initiative structures; humans approve 1.3.5 Operate concurrent planning horizons 263148 H=A — Agents maintain multiple planning timelines; humans prioritise across horizons

docs.title: 1.4 Manage Corporate Governance and Board Operations (619372)
docs.text:
Ensure the enterprise operates within its governance framework — including board management, fiduciary oversight, shareholder relations, and regulatory governance obligations.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.4.1 Manage board composition, meetings, and administration 485213 h+A — Agents handle scheduling, document prep, minutes; humans govern 1.4.2 Prepare and distribute board and committee packs 753648 h+A — Agent-assembled; humans review and approve content 1.4.3 Manage fiduciary and regulatory governance obligations 192837 H+a — Agents monitor compliance calendars; humans exercise fiduciary judgement 1.4.4 Coordinate shareholder and stakeholder communications 647312 H=A — Agents draft; humans approve tone and content 1.4.5 Maintain the corporate governance framework and policies 831456 H=A — Agents track regulatory changes and flag policy gaps; humans update policies

docs.title: 1.5 Manage Enterprise Performance (537182)
docs.text:
Establish and operate the enterprise performance management system — defining KPIs, tracking outcomes, conducting performance reviews, and ensuring accountability from strategy through to execution.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.5.1 Define enterprise KPIs and performance frameworks 412965 H+a — Humans define what matters; agents benchmark and recommend targets 1.5.2 Collect, aggregate, and validate performance data 869273 A — Agent-executed; continuous automated data collection 1.5.3 Analyse performance trends and identify variances 234817 h+A — Agents analyse and surface insights; humans interpret meaning 1.5.4 Conduct periodic performance reviews 695148 H+a — Agents prepare review materials; humans lead review discussions 1.5.5 Manage corrective actions and performance interventions 748321 H+a — Humans decide interventions; agents track execution and follow-up 1.5.6 Report performance to governance bodies and stakeholders 513429 h+A — Agents generate reports; humans present and contextualise

docs.title: 1.6 Manage Strategic Partnerships and Alliances (843625)
docs.text:
Identify, evaluate, establish, and govern strategic partnerships, joint ventures, alliances, and ecosystem relationships that extend the enterprise's capabilities and market reach.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.6.1 Identify and evaluate potential strategic partners 372841 H=A — Agents scan market and assess fit; humans evaluate relationship potential 1.6.2 Negotiate and formalise partnership agreements 916254 H — Human-led negotiation; agents support with research and document preparation 1.6.3 Manage ongoing partner relationships and governance 284163 H+a — Humans own relationships; agents track commitments and performance 1.6.4 Measure partner value and contribution 637412 h+A — Agents track metrics and ROI; humans assess strategic value 1.6.5 Manage partner ecosystem coordination 459823 H=A — Agents orchestrate information flow; humans manage strategic alignment

docs.title: 1.7 Manage Enterprise Architecture and Operating Model (291648)
docs.text:
Define, maintain, and evolve the enterprise's architecture and operating model — including the structural hierarchy, domain configuration, and blended workforce design that ZORBA itself describes.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.7.1 Define and maintain the enterprise operating model 823147 H+a — Humans design; agents maintain documentation and track drift 1.7.2 Manage the enterprise domain and capability map 564219 H=A — Agents maintain the living map; humans make structural decisions 1.7.3 Design and govern the blended workforce architecture 715362 H+a — Humans set workforce composition targets; agents model scenarios and monitor actuals 1.7.4 Manage framework adoption and customisation 348972 H=A — Agents track framework versions and compliance; humans decide adaptations 1.7.5 Conduct operating model reviews and maturity assessments 471836 H=A — Agents assess maturity against benchmarks; humans interpret and act

docs.title: 1.8 Manage Business Transformation and Change (165734)
docs.text:
Plan, coordinate, and execute enterprise-wide transformation initiatives — including organisational change, digital transformation, operating model transitions, and strategic restructuring.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.8.1 Identify and prioritise transformation opportunities 924183 H=A — Agents surface opportunities from data; humans prioritise by strategic value 1.8.2 Design transformation programmes and roadmaps 647521 H+a — Humans design; agents model dependencies and timelines 1.8.3 Manage organisational change and stakeholder readiness 382714 H+a — Humans lead change; agents monitor sentiment and readiness indicators 1.8.4 Execute and track transformation initiatives 538469 H=A — Agents track milestones, risks, and dependencies; humans lead delivery 1.8.5 Measure transformation outcomes and realise benefits 814237 h+A — Agents measure and report; humans validate benefit realisation 1.8.6 Embed change and ensure sustainability of new ways of working 276948 H+a — Humans reinforce behaviours; agents monitor adoption and flag regression

docs.title: 1.9 Manage Enterprise Risk Oversight (428519)
docs.text:
Provide enterprise-wide risk oversight — identifying, assessing, and monitoring strategic and operational risks that span domains and organisational units. This is the strategic risk layer; domain-specific risk management sits within Domain 11 (Risk, Legal & Compliance).

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.9.1 Define the enterprise risk appetite and tolerance 753219 H — Human decision; agents provide risk landscape context 1.9.2 Identify and assess enterprise-level risks 319847 H=A — Agents scan for emerging risks; humans assess severity and likelihood 1.9.3 Monitor the enterprise risk landscape continuously 862431 A — Agent-executed; continuous monitoring with human-defined alert thresholds 1.9.4 Report risk exposure to governance bodies 547183 h+A — Agents compile risk reports; humans present and contextualise 1.9.5 Coordinate risk response across domains and OUs 691524 H+a — Humans lead cross-domain response; agents track actions and dependencies

docs.title: 1.10 Manage Mergers, Acquisitions, and Divestitures (374156)
docs.text:
Evaluate, execute, and integrate (or separate) corporate transactions that reshape the enterprise's portfolio of businesses.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 1.10.1 Scan and evaluate acquisition and divestiture targets 218463 H=A — Agents screen and model; humans evaluate strategic fit 1.10.2 Conduct due diligence 785314 H=A — Agents process and analyse data rooms; humans assess risks and red flags 1.10.3 Negotiate and structure transactions 436129 H — Human-led negotiation with agent research support 1.10.4 Plan and execute post-merger integration 862541 H+a — Humans lead integration; agents track workstreams and synergies 1.10.5 Plan and execute divestitures and separations 519873 H+a — Humans lead separation; agents manage checklists and dependencies

docs.title: Domain 2: Product & Innovation (482917)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Creating what the market needs next

Classification: Value Chain Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to envision, design, build, and evolve the products and services that deliver value to its customers and markets. It spans from early-stage ideation and research through to product lifecycle management and retirement, including the intellectual property that protects competitive advantage. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, this domain is where agentic capabilities most visibly augment human creativity — with agents accelerating research synthesis, automating testing cycles, generating design variations, and providing real-time product analytics that inform every decision from concept through sunset.

docs.title: ZORBA Hierarchy: Domain → Capability → Process
docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────
Domain         │  Category            │  Major area of enterprise activity
Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 2.1 Shape Product Strategy and Portfolio Direction (361742)
docs.text:
Define the overarching product vision, establish portfolio priorities, and maintain a coherent product strategy aligned to enterprise goals. This capability ensures product investments are deliberate and balanced across horizons.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 2.1.1 Articulate the product vision and strategic positioning 529184 H — Human-led; product vision requires authentic market intuition 2.1.2 Assess market opportunities and whitespace analysis 847263 h+A — Agents scan markets and model TAM; humans evaluate strategic fit 2.1.3 Define and balance the product portfolio across horizons 613427 H+a — Humans set portfolio mix; agents model resource trade-offs 2.1.4 Establish product investment criteria and funding models 295814 H+a — Humans define criteria; agents benchmark against industry norms 2.1.5 Conduct periodic portfolio reviews and rationalisation 738562 H=A — Agents compile performance data; humans decide keep/kill/invest 2.1.6 Align product roadmaps with enterprise strategy 184239 H=A — Agents flag misalignments; humans resolve strategic tensions

docs.title: 2.2 Discover and Validate Product Opportunities (527163)
docs.text:
Systematically identify, explore, and validate new product concepts before committing significant development resources. This capability bridges insight and action through structured experimentation.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 2.2.1 Gather and synthesise customer needs and pain points 493821 h+A — Agents aggregate feedback from multiple channels; humans identify patterns 2.2.2 Generate and explore product concepts and ideas 716348 H=A — Agents generate concept variations and provocations; humans curate and refine 2.2.3 Conduct rapid prototyping and concept testing 382519 H=A — Agents build prototype simulations; humans evaluate user response 2.2.4 Validate market demand and willingness to pay 861234 h+A — Agents run conjoint analyses and survey automation; humans interpret signals 2.2.5 Build and assess business cases for new products 254697 H=A — Agents model financials and scenarios; humans judge viability

docs.title: 2.3 Design and Engineer Products and Services (649281)
docs.text:
Execute the core design and engineering work that transforms validated concepts into market-ready products. This capability covers requirements definition, architecture, development, and quality assurance.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 2.3.1 Define product requirements and acceptance criteria 514738 H+a — Humans specify requirements; agents structure and cross-reference 2.3.2 Design product architecture and technical specifications 928471 H+a — Humans architect; agents generate documentation and check consistency 2.3.3 Execute product development and build cycles 347165 H=A — Agents assist with code generation, component design; humans lead creation 2.3.4 Conduct quality assurance and automated testing 763829 h+A — Agents execute test suites and regression tests; humans define test strategy 2.3.5 Manage product configuration and variant engineering 481592 H=A — Agents manage configuration matrices; humans approve variant decisions 2.3.6 Perform usability and accessibility validation 629413 H=A — Agents run automated accessibility checks; humans conduct user testing

docs.title: 2.4 Manage the Innovation Pipeline and Experimentation (815423)
docs.text:
Operate a structured pipeline for innovation — from early-stage ideas through to funded initiatives — ensuring a healthy flow of experiments, validated learning, and scaled innovations.

Building demand and shaping perception

Classification: Value Chain Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview

It spans the full marketing spectrum from strategic planning and brand stewardship through to campaign execution, content production, and performance measurement. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, marketing is where agentic scale meets human creativity — with agents producing content variations at unprecedented speed, optimising campaigns in real time, automating attribution analysis, and freeing marketers to focus on strategy, storytelling, and brand authenticity.

Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Converting relationships into revenue

Classification: Value Chain Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to identify, pursue, win, and grow customer relationships that generate revenue. It spans the full sales spectrum from strategic territory design and pipeline management through to deal execution, account development, and revenue operations. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, sales is where agents handle the data-heavy mechanics of selling — scoring leads, maintaining CRM hygiene, generating proposals, and forecasting revenue — while humans focus on relationship building, complex negotiation, and strategic account development.

Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Delivering outcomes that earn loyalty

Classification: Value Chain Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to support customers after the sale, ensure they achieve their desired outcomes, manage service delivery, and build long-term loyalty. It is the domain where customer relationships are sustained and deepened — and where blended workforces are already most visibly operational. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, this domain is the proving ground for human-agent collaboration. Agents already handle the majority of initial customer interactions, while humans provide empathy, creative problem-solving, and relationship depth for complex scenarios.

docs.title: Domain 6: Operations & Delivery (471829)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Executing with precision and adaptability

Classification: Value Chain Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to plan, execute, and continuously improve its core operational activities — whether producing physical goods, delivering services, or running hybrid fulfilment models. It covers the full span from operational planning through delivery execution, quality assurance, and ongoing operational refinement. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, operations is where agents move from advisory to executive roles — scheduling production runs, monitoring quality in real time, detecting anomalies before they escalate, and orchestrating exception handling across the delivery chain.

docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description

docs.text:
Run the core operational processes that produce goods or deliver services — ensuring work is completed on time, to specification, and within cost targets.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 6.2.1 Initiate and manage production runs or service engagements 492638 H=A — Agents trigger and track; humans manage exceptions 6.2.2 Monitor work-in-progress and operational throughput 637281 A — Agent-executed; real-time monitoring with threshold-based alerts 6.2.3 Manage handoffs and transitions between operational stages 318457 h+A — Agents orchestrate transitions; humans handle escalations 6.2.4 Record and validate completion of deliverables 754129 h+A — Agents log completions and validate against specs; humans sign off critical items 6.2.5 Manage rework, returns, and service recovery processes 861345 H+a — Humans lead recovery decisions; agents track and report rework costs 6.2.6 Coordinate delivery and fulfilment to the customer 245893 H=A — Agents manage logistics handoffs; humans handle customer-sensitive issues

docs.title: 6.3 Manage Quality and Assurance (536482)
docs.text:
Establish and operate the quality management system — defining standards, conducting inspections, managing non-conformances, and ensuring consistent output quality across all operational activities.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 6.3.1 Define quality standards, specifications, and acceptance criteria 419573 H+a — Humans set standards; agents benchmark against industry norms 6.3.2 Conduct in-process and final quality inspections 782316 h+A — Agents perform automated checks; humans inspect edge cases 6.3.3 Detect, log, and classify non-conformances 364925 A — Agent-executed; automated detection with classification models 6.3.4 Investigate root causes and determine corrective actions 651748 H+a — Humans lead root-cause analysis; agents correlate data and suggest hypotheses 6.3.5 Track corrective and preventive action closure 893261 h+A — Agents track timelines and chase overdue actions; humans verify effectiveness 6.3.6 Manage quality audits and certification compliance 127584 H=A — Agents prepare audit evidence; humans conduct and respond to audits

docs.title: 6.4 Drive Operational Excellence and Continuous Improvement (274951)
docs.text:
Build and sustain a culture and practice of continuous improvement — leveraging methodologies, metrics, and employee engagement to systematically eliminate waste and enhance performance.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 6.4.1 Establish and maintain the continuous improvement framework 593847 H+a — Humans design the framework; agents maintain documentation and track adoption 6.4.2 Identify improvement opportunities from operational data 816234 h+A — Agents mine data for patterns and waste; humans validate and prioritise 6.4.3 Manage the improvement initiative pipeline 428716 H=A — Agents track initiatives and ROI; humans approve and resource projects 6.4.4 Facilitate improvement workshops and problem-solving events 345192 H+a — Humans facilitate; agents prepare data packs and track outcomes 6.4.5 Measure and report improvement impact 762481 h+A — Agents calculate savings and performance uplift; humans validate claims

docs.title: 6.5 Manage Operational Capacity (918263)
docs.text:
Plan, monitor, and adjust capacity to meet current and anticipated demand — balancing utilisation, flexibility, and cost across people, equipment, and facilities.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 6.5.1 Assess current capacity and utilisation levels 483619 A — Agent-executed; continuous monitoring of capacity metrics 6.5.2 Forecast capacity requirements against demand plans 217438 h+A — Agents model scenarios; humans review assumptions and approve 6.5.3 Plan and execute capacity adjustments 695172 H+a — Humans decide capacity changes; agents model cost and timing implications 6.5.4 Manage equipment, facility, and workforce availability 354281 H=A — Agents track availability and flag risks; humans resolve constraints 6.5.5 Monitor capacity performance and recommend rebalancing 738425 h+A — Agents surface rebalancing opportunities; humans approve changes

docs.text:
Identify, assess, and mitigate risks specific to operational delivery — including supply disruptions, equipment failures, safety incidents, and process breakdowns. This is the operational risk layer; enterprise-wide risk oversight sits within Domain 1.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 6.6.1 Identify and assess operational risks and vulnerabilities 584321 H=A — Agents scan for emerging risks; humans assess severity and define responses 6.6.2 Define and maintain operational risk mitigation plans 419682 H+a — Humans design mitigations; agents track implementation and test readiness 6.6.3 Monitor operational risk indicators in real time 763215 A — Agent-executed; continuous monitoring with escalation protocols 6.6.4 Conduct operational resilience testing and simulations 291843 H=A — Agents run simulations; humans evaluate results and refine plans 6.6.5 Manage business continuity for operational functions 847536 H+a — Humans own continuity plans; agents monitor triggers and coordinate activation

docs.title: 6.7 Handle Incidents and Operational Exceptions (643518)
docs.text:
Detect, respond to, and resolve incidents and exceptions that disrupt normal operational flow — restoring service, minimising impact, and capturing lessons for prevention.

docs.title: Domain 7: Supply Chain (824713)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Building a resilient, responsive supply network

Classification: Value Chain Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to source, procure, move, store, and distribute goods and services across its extended supply network. It spans from upstream supplier relationships through internal logistics to final-mile delivery, and includes the planning and risk management activities that keep the supply chain responsive and resilient. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, the supply chain is arguably the most agent-ready domain — with mature use cases in demand forecasting, inventory optimisation, route planning, supplier monitoring, and autonomous procurement within defined parameters. Agents here operate at scale and speed that human-only models cannot match.

docs.title: ZORBA Hierarchy: Domain → Capability → Process
docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────
Domain         │  Category            │  Major area of enterprise activity
Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 7.1 Source and Procure Goods and Services (391572)
docs.text:
Identify, evaluate, negotiate, and contract with suppliers to secure the goods and services the enterprise requires — balancing cost, quality, risk, and sustainability objectives.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 7.1.1 Define sourcing strategies and category plans 518234 H+a — Humans design strategy; agents analyse spend data and market conditions 7.1.2 Identify and qualify potential suppliers 673841 h+A — Agents screen supplier databases and assess fit; humans shortlist 7.1.3 Conduct sourcing events and negotiate terms 429187 H+a — Humans lead negotiations; agents model scenarios and benchmark pricing 7.1.4 Manage purchase orders and procurement transactions 856312 A — Agent-executed; automated PO creation within approved parameters 7.1.5 Evaluate and onboard new suppliers 294768 H=A — Agents run due diligence checks; humans make final approval decisions 7.1.6 Manage contract compliance and renewal cycles 731456 h+A — Agents track contract terms and flag renewals; humans negotiate amendments

docs.title: 7.2 Manage Supplier Relationships and Performance (562381)
docs.text:
Build, maintain, and govern ongoing relationships with suppliers — monitoring performance, managing development, and ensuring mutual value creation across the supply base.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 7.2.1 Segment and tier the supplier base 184329 H=A — Agents analyse spend and risk data; humans define segmentation criteria 7.2.2 Monitor and evaluate supplier performance 647213 h+A — Agents track KPIs and generate scorecards; humans review and act 7.2.3 Conduct supplier business reviews and development programmes 815674 H+a — Humans lead reviews; agents prepare performance packs and trend analysis 7.2.4 Manage supplier corrective actions and improvement plans 392847 H=A — Agents track actions and deadlines; humans manage supplier engagement 7.2.5 Manage supplier risk and contingency planning 536412 h+A — Agents monitor risk signals (financial, geopolitical); humans define contingencies

docs.title: 7.3 Plan and Manage Logistics and Distribution (418639)
docs.text:
Design, operate, and optimise the physical movement of goods from origin to destination — including transportation, warehousing, and distribution network management.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 7.3.1 Design and optimise the distribution network 729385 H=A — Agents model network scenarios; humans decide structural changes 7.3.2 Plan and schedule transportation movements 563412 A — Agent-executed; automated route optimisation and carrier assignment 7.3.3 Manage warehousing and distribution centre operations 847261 H=A — Agents optimise storage and picking; humans manage workforce and exceptions 7.3.4 Track shipments and manage in-transit visibility 218534 A — Agent-executed; real-time tracking with proactive exception alerts 7.3.5 Manage freight costs and carrier performance 694173 h+A — Agents analyse costs and benchmark carriers; humans negotiate and select 7.3.6 Manage returns logistics and reverse supply chain 375918 H=A — Agents process returns and route items; humans handle disposition decisions

docs.title: 7.4 Manage Inventory Across the Supply Network (257914)
docs.text:
Plan, control, and optimise inventory levels across all nodes in the supply chain — balancing service levels, working capital, and obsolescence risk.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 7.4.1 Set inventory policies and target service levels 483126 H+a — Humans define policies; agents model trade-offs and recommend targets 7.4.2 Monitor inventory positions and movements in real time 926347 A — Agent-executed; continuous visibility with automated reorder triggers 7.4.3 Optimise replenishment and reorder parameters 614283 h+A — Agents calculate optimal parameters; humans approve significant changes 7.4.4 Manage slow-moving, excess, and obsolete inventory 730226 H=A — Agents identify at-risk stock; humans decide write-down or disposal actions 7.4.5 Conduct inventory counts and reconciliation 742158 H=A — Agents schedule and track counts; humans investigate discrepancies

docs.title: 7.5 Optimise Demand Forecasting and Supply Planning (693248)
docs.text:
Generate, refine, and act on demand forecasts that drive supply chain planning decisions — integrating statistical models, market intelligence, and collaborative input from sales and operations.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 7.5.1 Generate statistical demand forecasts 821634 A — Agent-executed; automated model selection and forecast generation 7.5.2 Enrich forecasts with market intelligence and sales input 475312 H=A — Agents integrate data sources; humans add qualitative judgement 7.5.3 Conduct sales and operations planning cycles 316849 H+a — Humans lead consensus process; agents prepare scenarios and gap analysis 7.5.4 Translate demand plans into supply and production signals 548273 h+A — Agents generate supply plans; humans validate feasibility 7.5.5 Monitor forecast accuracy and refine models 192467 A — Agent-executed; continuous model tuning with human review of significant shifts 7.5.6 Manage demand shaping and demand sensing 763518 h+A — Agents detect demand signals in real time; humans decide shaping actions

docs.title: 7.6 Manage Supply Chain Risk and Resilience (438172)
docs.text:
Identify, monitor, and mitigate risks across the extended supply chain — from single-source dependencies to geopolitical disruptions — ensuring the supply network can absorb and recover from shocks.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 7.6.1 Map and assess supply chain risk exposure 524381 h+A — Agents map multi-tier dependencies; humans assess strategic vulnerabilities 7.6.2 Monitor supply chain risk signals and early warnings 879643 A — Agent-executed; continuous scanning of geopolitical, weather, and financial signals 7.6.3 Develop and maintain supply chain contingency plans 316524 H+a — Humans design contingencies; agents maintain playbooks and test readiness 7.6.4 Execute supply chain disruption response 741283 H=A — Agents activate playbooks and reroute; humans manage critical decisions 7.6.5 Conduct supply chain resilience assessments and stress tests 253918 H=A — Agents run simulations; humans evaluate findings and invest in resilience

docs.title: 7.7 Govern Third-Party and Partner Ecosystem Relationships (185463)
docs.text:
Manage the broader ecosystem of third-party service providers, logistics partners, contract manufacturers, and platform participants that extend the enterprise's supply chain capabilities.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 7.7.1 Define third-party governance frameworks and standards 642179 H+a — Humans set governance standards; agents benchmark and track compliance 7.7.2 Onboard and integrate ecosystem partners 397514 H=A — Agents manage onboarding workflows; humans approve and establish relationships 7.7.3 Monitor ecosystem partner performance and compliance 813246 h+A — Agents track SLAs and compliance metrics; humans manage escalations 7.7.4 Manage data exchange and integration across the ecosystem 564832 h+A — Agents operate integration platforms; humans govern data standards 7.7.5 Review and rationalise the partner ecosystem periodically 238617 H+a — Humans make portfolio decisions; agents analyse utilisation and overlap

docs.title: Domain 8: Finance (593417)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Funding growth and protecting the bottom line

Classification: Management Function Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to plan, allocate, record, and report on financial resources — ensuring fiscal discipline, regulatory compliance, and the financial intelligence needed to support strategic decision-making. It spans from long-range financial planning through day-to-day transaction processing to external reporting and audit readiness. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, finance is a domain of high automation potential in transactional processes (accounts payable, reconciliation, reporting) while retaining strong human leadership in judgement-intensive areas such as treasury strategy, tax planning, and stakeholder communication.

docs.title: ZORBA Hierarchy: Domain → Capability → Process
docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────
Domain         │  Category            │  Major area of enterprise activity
Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 8.1 Plan and Analyse Financial Performance (362819)
docs.text:
Develop financial plans, budgets, and forecasts that translate strategic intent into financial targets — and provide ongoing analysis to track performance, explain variances, and inform decisions.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 8.1.1 Develop annual budgets and long-range financial plans 725163 H+a — Humans lead planning; agents compile data and model scenarios 8.1.2 Prepare rolling forecasts and outlook updates 493218 h+A — Agents generate forecasts from actuals and trends; humans adjust assumptions 8.1.3 Analyse financial performance and explain variances 861347 h+A — Agents compute variances and surface drivers; humans interpret and narrate 8.1.4 Model financial scenarios and investment cases 537412 H=A — Agents build models; humans define assumptions and evaluate outcomes 8.1.5 Provide financial decision support to business leaders 284659 H+a — Humans advise; agents prepare briefings and ad hoc analysis 8.1.6 Monitor financial KPIs and early warning indicators 916743 A — Agent-executed; continuous dashboard monitoring with threshold alerts

docs.title: 8.2 Manage Accounting and the General Ledger (741385)
docs.text:
Maintain the enterprise's books of record — processing journal entries, managing the chart of accounts, performing reconciliations, and ensuring the general ledger accurately reflects all financial activity.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 8.2.1 Maintain and govern the chart of accounts 352816 H+a — Humans own account structure; agents flag inconsistencies and suggest harmonisation 8.2.2 Process journal entries and adjustments 628491 h+A — Agents post routine entries; humans review and approve non-standard journals 8.2.3 Perform account reconciliations 174523 A — Agent-executed; automated matching with human review of exceptions 8.2.4 Manage intercompany transactions and eliminations 845362 h+A — Agents process and reconcile; humans resolve disputes and policy questions 8.2.5 Execute period-end close processes 593174 H=A — Agents orchestrate close checklists and track completion; humans manage judgements 8.2.6 Manage fixed asset accounting and depreciation 416238 h+A — Agents calculate depreciation and track assets; humans approve disposals

docs.title: 8.3 Process Accounts Payable and Receivable (219648)
docs.text:
Manage the enterprise's payment obligations to suppliers and the collection of amounts owed by customers — ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and optimal cash flow management.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 8.3.1 Receive, validate, and code supplier invoices 374852 A — Agent-executed; automated invoice capture, matching, and coding 8.3.2 Manage payment runs and disbursements 618473 h+A — Agents schedule and execute payments; humans approve above thresholds 8.3.3 Manage supplier queries and dispute resolution 543219 H=A — Agents track disputes and compile evidence; humans negotiate resolutions 8.3.4 Generate and distribute customer invoices 892163 A — Agent-executed; automated billing based on delivery and contract data 8.3.5 Monitor receivables ageing and pursue collections 736524 h+A — Agents send reminders and escalate; humans handle sensitive or large accounts 8.3.6 Process customer payments and apply cash receipts 451837 A — Agent-executed; automated matching and application with exception routing 8.3.7 Manage credit exposure and bad debt provisions 268314 H+a — Humans set credit policy; agents monitor exposure and flag breaches

docs.text:
Oversee the enterprise's cash position, liquidity, banking relationships, and financial risk exposures — ensuring sufficient funding is available and financial risks are managed within appetite.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 8.4.1 Forecast cash flows and manage liquidity positions 319472 h+A — Agents generate daily/weekly cash forecasts; humans review and adjust 8.4.2 Manage banking relationships and account structures 672148 H+a — Humans own bank relationships; agents track fees and service levels 8.4.3 Execute and manage investment and borrowing activities 825314 H — Human-led; agents provide market data and scenario analysis 8.4.4 Manage foreign exchange and interest rate exposures 547831 H=A — Agents monitor exposures and model hedging; humans approve strategies 8.4.5 Perform daily cash positioning and fund transfers 193624 h+A — Agents execute routine transfers; humans approve large or unusual movements

docs.text:
Ensure the enterprise meets all tax obligations accurately and on time — while proactively planning to optimise the tax position within legal and ethical boundaries.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 8.5.1 Develop and maintain the enterprise tax strategy 824516 H — Human-led; requires professional judgement and regulatory interpretation 8.5.2 Calculate and prepare direct and indirect tax returns 473821 h+A — Agents compute tax positions and draft returns; humans review and submit 8.5.3 Manage transfer pricing documentation and compliance 615342 H=A — Agents maintain documentation; humans make policy decisions 8.5.4 Monitor tax legislation changes and assess impact 291438 h+A — Agents scan regulatory changes; humans assess strategic implications 8.5.5 Manage tax audits and authority inquiries 748163 H+a — Humans lead audit responses; agents compile evidence and track requests

docs.text:
Produce accurate, timely financial reports for internal and external stakeholders — including statutory accounts, management reports, and consolidated group financial statements.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 8.6.1 Prepare statutory financial statements 394217 H=A — Agents compile and format; humans review and ensure compliance 8.6.2 Perform group consolidation and eliminate intercompany balances 821546 h+A — Agents execute consolidation rules; humans resolve complex judgements 8.6.3 Produce management reporting packs and dashboards 567413 h+A — Agents generate reports from live data; humans add commentary and insight 8.6.4 Prepare regulatory and supervisory filings 243815 H=A — Agents compile data and draft filings; humans validate and submit 8.6.5 Manage external stakeholder financial communications 751673 H+a — Humans own messaging and narrative; agents prepare supporting materials 8.6.6 Manage financial data quality and master data governance 482631 h+A — Agents monitor data quality; humans resolve structural issues

Design, operate, and test the internal control environment over financial reporting and transactions — ensuring the enterprise can demonstrate effective governance and withstand internal and external audit scrutiny.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 8.7.1 Design and document financial controls and control frameworks 758241 H+a — Humans design controls; agents maintain control documentation 8.7.2 Execute and evidence key financial controls 413672 H=A — Agents perform automated controls and log evidence; humans execute manual controls 8.7.3 Test control effectiveness and remediate deficiencies 683594 H=A — Agents run control tests; humans evaluate results and oversee remediation 8.7.4 Support internal audit engagement and follow-up 864312 H+a — Humans liaise with auditors; agents compile evidence and track findings 8.7.5 Coordinate external audit processes and information requests 291537 H=A — Agents manage information requests and track status; humans manage the relationship 8.7.6 Manage segregation of duties and access controls 637148 h+A — Agents monitor access patterns and flag violations; humans remediate

docs.title: Domain 9: People & Talent (482731)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Attracting and orchestrating the blended workforce

Classification: Management Function Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to attract, develop, engage, and retain the human talent it needs — while simultaneously provisioning, calibrating, and managing the agent workforce that operates alongside them. It spans the full employee lifecycle from workforce planning through separation, and extends into the uniquely ZORBA territory of blended workforce orchestration. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, this domain is where the human and agent workforces are designed, composed, and harmonised — ensuring that every role, whether filled by a person or an agent, is deliberately planned, appropriately skilled, and continuously optimised.

docs.title: ZORBA Hierarchy: Domain → Capability → Process
docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────
Domain         │  Category            │  Major area of enterprise activity
Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 9.1 Plan and Analyse the Workforce (361842)
docs.text:
Forecast workforce demand, assess current capacity, identify skills gaps, and build strategic workforce plans that inform talent acquisition, development, and deployment decisions.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 9.1.1 Forecast workforce demand by role, skill, and location 529174 h+A — Agents model demand using business plans and attrition data; humans validate assumptions 9.1.2 Assess current workforce capacity and skills inventory 814263 h+A — Agents aggregate skills data from multiple systems; humans verify accuracy 9.1.3 Identify critical skills gaps and surplus areas 673918 H=A — Agents surface gaps through analytics; humans interpret strategic implications 9.1.4 Develop strategic workforce plans and scenarios 245781 H+a — Humans design workforce strategy; agents model cost and feasibility scenarios 9.1.5 Monitor workforce metrics and trigger plan adjustments 918437 A — Agent-executed; continuous monitoring with automated alerting on threshold breaches

# Process ID Agentic Profile 9.2.1 Define role requirements and craft position profiles 382549 H=A — Agents draft from templates and market data; humans refine and approve 9.2.2 Source and attract candidates through multiple channels 617284 h+A — Agents manage job postings, screen CVs, and engage passive talent; humans curate shortlists 9.2.3 Assess and select candidates through structured evaluation 453712 H+a — Humans lead interviews and decisions; agents schedule, score assessments, and flag inconsistencies 9.2.4 Extend offers and manage pre-employment processes 198436 H=A — Agents generate offers and manage checks; humans approve terms and handle negotiations 9.2.5 Deliver structured onboarding programmes 726351 H=A — Agents orchestrate onboarding journeys and track completion; humans provide cultural integration 9.2.6 Evaluate onboarding effectiveness and time-to-productivity 564893 h+A — Agents measure onboarding KPIs; humans interpret and refine the programme

docs.title: 9.3 Develop Skills and Foster Continuous Learning (285641)
docs.text:
Build organisational capability through learning programmes, career development, coaching, and knowledge-sharing — ensuring the workforce evolves in line with strategic needs.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 9.3.1 Assess learning needs across the organisation 413872 H=A — Agents analyse skills gaps and performance data; humans prioritise development areas 9.3.2 Design and curate learning programmes and content 769215 H+a — Humans design curricula; agents curate content and personalise learning paths 9.3.3 Deliver learning through multiple modalities 328946 H=A — Agents deliver digital learning and track progress; humans facilitate workshops and coaching 9.3.4 Manage career development and succession planning 651428 H+a — Humans guide career conversations; agents maintain succession pipelines and readiness dashboards 9.3.5 Operate mentoring and coaching programmes 894317 H — Human-led; agents match mentors to mentees and schedule sessions 9.3.6 Measure learning impact and return on investment 537264 h+A — Agents track completion, assessment scores, and performance correlation; humans validate business impact

docs.text:
Design, administer, and continuously optimise the total rewards proposition — ensuring it attracts and retains talent while remaining financially sustainable and equitable.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 9.4.1 Design compensation structures and pay frameworks 482139 H+a — Humans design philosophy and structures; agents benchmark against market data 9.4.2 Administer payroll and compensation processing 736518 A — Agent-executed; automated payroll runs with human exception handling 9.4.3 Manage employee benefits programmes and enrolment 541046 H=A — Agents administer enrolment and queries; humans design benefits strategy 9.4.4 Operate recognition and reward programmes 518463 H+a — Humans design programmes; agents track nominations and distribute rewards 9.4.5 Conduct pay equity analysis and remediation 847321 h+A — Agents analyse pay data for disparities; humans decide remediation actions

Shape the end-to-end employee experience — from cultural environment to wellbeing — and actively monitor and improve workforce engagement to drive retention and performance.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 9.5.1 Design and manage the employee experience journey 639217 H+a — Humans design experience touchpoints; agents map journeys and identify friction 9.5.2 Measure and analyse employee engagement 481753 h+A — Agents deploy surveys, analyse sentiment, and surface trends; humans interpret and act 9.5.3 Manage employee wellbeing and welfare programmes 352946 H+a — Humans design programmes and provide pastoral support; agents signpost resources and track utilisation 9.5.4 Foster workplace culture and inclusion 718294 H — Human-led; culture requires authentic human leadership and role modelling 9.5.5 Manage internal employee communication channels 263841 H=A — Agents create and distribute content; humans set narrative and tone 9.5.6 Handle employee grievances and conflict resolution 895412 H — Human-led; agents manage case tracking and documentation only

docs.title: 9.6 Operate HR Administration and Services (527389)
docs.text:
Deliver efficient, accurate, and compliant HR operational services — including employee records management, policy administration, and HR service delivery.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 9.6.1 Maintain employee records and HR master data 741628 A — Agent-executed; automated record maintenance with human audit 9.6.2 Administer HR policies and procedures 368215 H=A — Agents distribute policies and track acknowledgement; humans author and update policies 9.6.3 Operate the HR service desk and case management 294573 h+A — Agents handle tier-1 queries and route complex cases; humans resolve escalations 9.6.4 Manage employee lifecycle events and transitions 856149 H=A — Agents process promotions, transfers, and separations; humans approve and communicate 9.6.5 Ensure HR regulatory compliance and statutory reporting 612837 h+A — Agents monitor regulatory changes and prepare filings; humans review and submit

docs.title: 9.7 Manage the Blended Workforce (938214)
docs.text:
ZORBA-specific capability. Provision, configure, monitor, and govern the agent workforce alongside the human workforce — ensuring agents are treated as managed participants in the operating model with defined roles, performance expectations, trust boundaries, and lifecycle management.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 9.7.1 Provision and configure new agents into the workforce 427813 H=A — Agents automate provisioning workflows; humans approve agent deployment and role assignment 9.7.2 Define agent roles, responsibilities, and trust boundaries 583146 H+a — Humans define trust levels and guardrails; agents maintain the role registry 9.7.3 Monitor agent performance and behavioural compliance 719432 h+A — Agents monitor agent fleet metrics and flag anomalies; humans investigate and intervene 9.7.4 Calibrate agent trust levels and autonomy thresholds 264891 H+a — Humans set trust policy; agents track performance and recommend recalibration 9.7.5 Manage the agent lifecycle — updates, retraining, and retirement 835617 H=A — Agents execute lifecycle workflows; humans approve major transitions and decommissioning 9.7.6 Coordinate human-agent teaming and workload distribution 391528 H=A — Agents optimise task routing; humans oversee balance and intervene on conflicts 9.7.7 Report on blended workforce composition and effectiveness 642375 h+A — Agents generate dashboards and trend reports; humans interpret and present to leadership

docs.title: Domain 10: Technology & Data (921426)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Powering the enterprise with platforms and insight

Classification: Management Function Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to design, build, operate, and evolve its technology landscape — from core infrastructure and applications through to data platforms, cybersecurity, and end-user technology services. It ensures technology investments align with strategic intent and that data is treated as a first-class enterprise asset. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, this domain carries a unique additional responsibility: managing the agent platform itself. The technology function not only deploys agents — it operates the infrastructure, tooling, and guardrails that make the blended workforce possible.

docs.title: ZORBA Hierarchy: Domain → Capability → Process
docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────
Domain         │  Category            │  Major area of enterprise activity
Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 10.1 Shape Technology Strategy and Architecture (700381)
docs.text:
Define the technology vision, principles, and enterprise architecture that guide investment decisions, platform choices, and the evolution of the technology estate.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 10.1.1 Define the enterprise technology vision and principles 631824 H — Human-led; technology strategy requires human judgement on business priorities 10.1.2 Develop and maintain enterprise architecture standards 274953 H=A — Agents maintain architecture artefacts; humans set standards and make trade-offs 10.1.3 Assess emerging technologies and evaluate adoption readiness 918362 h+A — Agents scan, evaluate, and benchmark; humans decide strategic relevance 10.1.4 Manage the technology investment portfolio and roadmap 453271 H+a — Humans prioritise investments; agents model costs and dependencies 10.1.5 Govern architecture conformance and technical debt 186439 H=A — Agents detect drift and debt; humans approve remediation priorities

docs.title: 10.2 Build and Manage Applications (674421)
docs.text:
Design, develop, test, deploy, and maintain the enterprise's application portfolio — including custom-built, configured, and integrated software solutions.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 10.2.1 Gather and prioritise application requirements 741258 H=A — Agents collect and structure requirements; humans validate and prioritise 10.2.2 Design and architect application solutions 529463 H+a — Humans design; agents generate reference architectures and patterns 10.2.3 Develop and configure application code 384716 h+A — Agents generate and refactor code; humans review, approve, and guide 10.2.4 Test and validate application quality 862147 h+A — Agents execute automated test suites; humans define test strategies and review edge cases 10.2.5 Deploy and release applications to production 195384 H=A — Agents orchestrate CI/CD pipelines; humans approve production releases 10.2.6 Manage the application portfolio lifecycle 647932 H=A — Agents track usage, costs, and health; humans decide rationalisation actions

docs.title: 10.3 Operate Infrastructure and Cloud Platforms (714538)
docs.text:
Provision, manage, and optimise the enterprise's computing infrastructure — including on-premises, cloud, hybrid, and edge environments.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 10.3.1 Provision and configure infrastructure resources 428163 h+A — Agents execute infrastructure-as-code; humans define policies and approve changes 10.3.2 Monitor infrastructure health and performance 563291 A — Agent-autonomous; continuous monitoring with human-defined alert thresholds 10.3.3 Manage capacity planning and resource optimisation 819427 h+A — Agents forecast and recommend; humans approve scaling decisions 10.3.4 Operate cloud platform services and governance 246875 H=A — Agents enforce guardrails and track spend; humans set cloud strategy 10.3.5 Execute infrastructure auto-remediation and self-healing 738514 A — Agent-autonomous; automated remediation within predefined runbooks 10.3.6 Manage network and connectivity services 391648 H=A — Agents monitor and configure; humans approve topology changes

docs.title: 10.4 Govern Data and Deliver Analytics (283946)
docs.text:
Manage data as an enterprise asset — ensuring quality, accessibility, governance, and the delivery of analytics and insights that drive decision-making.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 10.4.1 Define data governance frameworks and ownership 625813 H+a — Humans define governance; agents maintain catalogues and lineage 10.4.2 Manage data quality, profiling, and remediation 948271 h+A — Agents profile and cleanse data; humans set quality thresholds and resolve exceptions 10.4.3 Build and operate data pipelines and integration 174593 A — Agent-executed; automated pipeline orchestration with human-defined schemas 10.4.4 Deliver business intelligence and reporting 983322 h+A — Agents generate dashboards and reports; humans interpret and act on insights 10.4.5 Develop and manage advanced analytics and models 812367 H=A — Agents train and tune models; humans validate methodology and interpret results 10.4.6 Manage master data and reference data 469752 H=A — Agents maintain records; humans resolve conflicts and approve golden records

docs.title: 10.5 Protect Information and Ensure Cyber Resilience (866025)
docs.text:
Defend the enterprise against cyber threats, manage information security risks, and ensure resilience through detection, response, and recovery capabilities.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 10.5.1 Define cybersecurity strategy and risk posture 317524 H — Human-led; security strategy requires executive judgement and risk appetite alignment 10.5.2 Manage identity, access, and authentication controls 853162 H=A — Agents enforce policies and detect anomalies; humans approve access exceptions 10.5.3 Monitor threats and operate security operations 246819 A — Agent-autonomous; continuous threat monitoring and initial incident triage 10.5.4 Respond to and recover from security incidents 671438 H+a — Humans lead incident response; agents execute containment playbooks and collect forensics 10.5.5 Conduct vulnerability management and penetration testing 594273 h+A — Agents scan and prioritise vulnerabilities; humans validate findings and approve remediation 10.5.6 Manage security awareness and training 914295 H=A — Agents deliver training and simulate phishing; humans design curriculum and review results

docs.title: 10.6 Deliver Technology Operations and End-User Support (158493)
docs.text:
Operate the day-to-day technology services that keep the enterprise running — including service desk, incident management, problem resolution, and end-user computing.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 10.6.1 Operate the service desk and manage service requests 824367 h+A — Agents handle tier-0/1 requests; humans manage complex escalations 10.6.2 Manage incidents and restore services 396142 H=A — Agents detect, categorise, and initiate response; humans lead major incident resolution 10.6.3 Conduct problem management and root cause analysis 571829 H+a — Humans lead analysis; agents correlate data and suggest patterns 10.6.4 Manage change and release processes 249618 H=A — Agents assess impact and schedule changes; humans approve and review 10.6.5 Provision and manage end-user devices and workplace technology 683475 h+A — Agents automate provisioning and configuration; humans handle exceptions

docs.title: 10.7 Manage the Agent Platform (925743)
docs.text:
Operate, evolve, and govern the infrastructure that enables enterprise AI agents — including agent hosting, orchestration, lifecycle management, and the tooling that connects agents to enterprise systems. This is the ZORBA-specific meta-capability: the technology that enables the blended workforce.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 10.7.1 Operate agent hosting infrastructure and runtime environments 348261 H=A — Agents monitor their own platform; humans manage capacity and architecture 10.7.2 Manage agent lifecycle — provisioning, versioning, and retirement 517948 H+a — Humans approve agent deployment; agents manage version control and rollback 10.7.3 Govern agent access to enterprise systems and data 264839 H — Human-led; access decisions require accountability and policy alignment 10.7.4 Monitor agent performance, health, and resource consumption 893162 A — Agent-autonomous; agents monitor agent fleet health and flag anomalies 10.7.5 Manage agent orchestration and inter-agent coordination 471526 H=A — Agents execute orchestration; humans define workflow boundaries and escalation rules 10.7.6 Maintain the agent tooling ecosystem and integration layer 635274 H=A — Agents maintain integrations; humans approve new tool access and capabilities 10.7.7 Manage agent platform security and isolation 182943 H+a — Humans set security policies; agents enforce isolation and detect breaches

docs.title: Domain 11: Risk, Legal & Compliance (329571)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Governing trust in a human-agent enterprise

Classification: Management Function Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's ability to identify, assess, and mitigate risk, provide legal counsel, ensure regulatory compliance, conduct independent assurance, and uphold ethical standards. It is the domain where organisational trust is built, protected, and demonstrated to regulators, customers, and the public. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, this domain bears a critical additional responsibility: governing the behaviour, compliance, and trustworthiness of AI agents — ensuring algorithmic decisions are explainable, auditable, and aligned with regulatory expectations and organisational values.

docs.title: ZORBA Hierarchy: Domain → Capability → Process
docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────
Domain         │  Category            │  Major area of enterprise activity
Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 11.1 Manage Enterprise Risk (481327)
docs.text:
Identify, assess, treat, and monitor risks across the enterprise — maintaining the risk register, operating risk frameworks, and ensuring risks are owned, communicated, and actively managed.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 11.1.1 Maintain the enterprise risk framework and taxonomy 724619 H+a — Humans design the framework; agents maintain documentation and version control 11.1.2 Identify and register risks across domains and units 358241 H=A — Agents scan for emerging risks and prompt registration; humans validate and classify 11.1.3 Assess and score risks by likelihood and impact 916473 H=A — Agents compute risk scores using agreed methodologies; humans exercise qualitative judgement 11.1.4 Define and track risk treatment plans 542168 H+a — Humans design treatments; agents track implementation and flag overdue actions 11.1.5 Monitor the risk landscape and produce risk reports 273894 h+A — Agents monitor continuously and generate risk dashboards; humans interpret for leadership 11.1.6 Conduct risk scenario analysis and stress testing 685312 H=A — Agents run simulations and model scenarios; humans define parameters and interpret results

docs.title: 11.2 Provide Legal Services and Manage Contracts (817432)
docs.text:
Deliver legal counsel to the enterprise, manage the contract lifecycle, handle disputes and litigation, and ensure the organisation's legal interests are protected.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 11.2.1 Provide legal advice and counsel to business units 439256 H — Human-led; legal judgement requires qualified human practitioners 11.2.2 Draft, review, and negotiate contracts 763148 H+a — Humans lead negotiation and review; agents draft from templates and flag non-standard clauses 11.2.3 Manage the contract lifecycle and obligations tracking 291875 h+A — Agents track milestones, renewals, and obligations; humans handle exceptions and renegotiations 11.2.4 Manage disputes, litigation, and regulatory proceedings 648312 H — Human-led; agents manage case files, deadlines, and document assembly 11.2.5 Maintain the legal entity structure and corporate records 527493 h+A — Agents maintain records and filing calendars; humans authorise structural changes 11.2.6 Manage intellectual property and brand protection 184736 H+a — Humans make IP strategy decisions; agents monitor infringement and manage filings

docs.title: 11.3 Ensure Regulatory Compliance (265918)
docs.text:
Monitor the regulatory environment, interpret obligations, implement compliance programmes, and demonstrate adherence to all applicable laws, regulations, and industry standards.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 11.3.1 Monitor and interpret regulatory changes and obligations 834152 h+A — Agents scan regulatory feeds and summarise changes; humans assess applicability 11.3.2 Design and implement compliance programmes 496731 H+a — Humans design programmes; agents operationalise controls and track adoption 11.3.3 Conduct compliance assessments and testing 713549 H=A — Agents execute automated compliance checks; humans investigate exceptions 11.3.4 Manage regulatory filings and submissions 358274 h+A — Agents prepare and submit filings; humans review and approve before submission 11.3.5 Manage relationships with regulators and supervisory bodies 621483 H — Human-led; regulatory relationships require human diplomacy and judgement

docs.title: 11.4 Conduct Internal Audit and Assurance (742613)
docs.text:
Provide independent, objective assurance over the effectiveness of governance, risk management, and internal controls — operating with professional scepticism and organisational independence.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 11.4.1 Develop the risk-based internal audit plan 318947 H+a — Humans set audit priorities; agents analyse risk data to inform planning 11.4.2 Execute audit engagements and fieldwork 856271 H=A — Agents perform data analytics and automated testing; humans conduct interviews and assess controls 11.4.3 Report audit findings and recommendations 493128 H+a — Humans form opinions and present findings; agents draft reports and track management responses 11.4.4 Monitor remediation of audit findings 627314 h+A — Agents track action completion and escalate overdue items; humans validate remediation quality 11.4.5 Assess internal audit effectiveness and independence 185439 H — Human-led; independence assessment requires human objectivity

docs.title: 11.5 Protect Data Privacy and Personal Information (593148)
docs.text:
Ensure the enterprise collects, processes, stores, and shares personal data lawfully, transparently, and securely — meeting the requirements of privacy regulations and respecting individual rights.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 11.5.1 Maintain the data privacy framework and policies 905427 H+a — Humans set privacy policy; agents track regulatory changes and flag required updates 11.5.2 Conduct data protection impact assessments 816542 H=A — Agents perform automated data mapping and initial assessments; humans evaluate high-risk processing 11.5.3 Manage data subject rights requests 439617 h+A — Agents process requests, locate data, and prepare responses; humans approve complex cases 11.5.4 Monitor data processing activities for compliance 758243 A — Agent-executed; continuous monitoring of data flows against consent and purpose records 11.5.5 Manage data breach notification and response 361829 H+a — Humans lead response and notification decisions; agents detect breaches and manage timelines

docs.title: 11.6 Uphold Ethics and Standards of Conduct (428173)
docs.text:
Establish and enforce the ethical standards, codes of conduct, and behavioural expectations that govern how people — and agents — operate within the enterprise.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 11.6.1 Define and maintain the code of ethics and conduct 537284 H — Human-led; ethical standards require human moral reasoning 11.6.2 Deliver ethics awareness and training programmes 841396 H=A — Agents deliver training modules and track completion; humans facilitate ethical reasoning discussions 11.6.3 Operate whistleblowing and speak-up channels 334130 H+a — Humans manage investigations; agents operate reporting channels and ensure anonymity 11.6.4 Investigate ethical violations and misconduct 382514 H — Human-led investigation; agents manage case files and evidence assembly 11.6.5 Monitor organisational culture and ethical climate 714928 H=A — Agents analyse survey data and behavioural signals; humans interpret and intervene

docs.title: 11.7 Govern AI Agents and Ensure Algorithmic Compliance (196482)
docs.text:
ZORBA-specific capability. Establish and operate the governance framework for AI agents — ensuring their decisions are explainable, their behaviour is auditable, their outputs are fair, and their operation complies with emerging AI regulations and organisational policies.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 11.7.1 Define and maintain the AI governance framework and policies 853217 H+a — Humans set governance principles; agents maintain the policy repository and version history 11.7.2 Conduct algorithmic impact assessments before deployment 472831 H=A — Agents run bias testing and impact simulations; humans evaluate results and approve deployment 11.7.3 Monitor agent decisions for fairness, bias, and drift 618943 h+A — Agents continuously monitor decision patterns and flag anomalies; humans investigate and remediate 11.7.4 Maintain audit trails and explainability records for agent actions 345176 A — Agent-executed; automated logging and explainability record generation 11.7.5 Ensure compliance with AI-specific regulations and standards 729368 H=A — Agents track evolving AI regulation; humans interpret obligations and design compliance responses 11.7.6 Manage AI incident response and agent-related escalations 561294 H+a — Humans lead incident response; agents isolate affected agents and preserve evidence 11.7.7 Report on AI governance maturity and agent compliance posture 887507 h+A — Agents generate compliance dashboards; humans present to governance bodies and regulators

docs.title: Domain 12: Corporate Services (751284)
docs.text:
Industry Edition: ZORBA for Enterprise Software

This is the ZORBA for Enterprise Software variant of this domain.

Running the engine that keeps everything moving

Classification: Management Function Version: v0.1 (Draft)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This domain encompasses the enterprise's supporting infrastructure — the facilities, communications, administrative services, and shared capabilities that enable every other domain to function effectively. It is the operational backbone that maintains the physical and organisational environment, communicates the enterprise story, manages sustainability obligations, and delivers efficient shared services. In a ZORBA-enabled enterprise, corporate services increasingly leverage agents for high-volume administrative workflows, facilities monitoring, and communications distribution — freeing human professionals to focus on strategic programmes and stakeholder relationships.

docs.text:
ZORBA Level    │  APQC Equivalent     │  Description
───────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────

Capability     │  Process Group       │  What the organisation can do
Process        │  Process             │  How work flows to deliver a capability

docs.title: 12.1 Manage Facilities and the Workplace Environment (462918)
docs.text:
Plan, operate, and maintain the physical and virtual workplace — ensuring safe, productive, and cost-effective environments for the enterprise's workforce.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 12.1.1 Plan and manage the real estate and property portfolio 318542 H+a — Humans make portfolio decisions; agents analyse utilisation data and lease terms 12.1.2 Operate building systems and facility maintenance 729461 h+A — Agents monitor IoT sensors and schedule maintenance; humans manage vendors and major repairs 12.1.3 Manage workplace health, safety, and security 584213 H+a — Humans set safety policy and lead incident response; agents monitor compliance and track incidents 12.1.4 Manage space allocation and workplace design 861374 H=A — Agents analyse occupancy patterns; humans design spaces and approve changes 12.1.5 Operate reception, mail, and visitor management services 243689 h+A — Agents manage visitor registration and mail routing; humans handle VIP reception and exceptions

docs.title: 12.2 Deliver Corporate Communications and Public Relations (537861)
docs.text:
Craft and distribute the enterprise's narrative — managing internal and external communications, media relations, crisis communications, and brand reputation.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 12.2.1 Develop corporate communication strategy and messaging frameworks 418273 H+a — Humans define narrative and strategy; agents research audience insights and benchmark messaging 12.2.2 Manage internal communications and employee broadcasts 693142 H=A — Agents create and distribute content; humans set editorial direction and approve sensitive messages 12.2.3 Manage media relations and press engagement 614750 H — Human-led; media relationships require human judgement and rapport 12.2.4 Operate crisis communications and rapid response 856917 H+a — Humans lead crisis response; agents monitor media, draft holding statements, and track coverage 12.2.5 Manage executive communications and thought leadership 341628 H+a — Humans provide voice and ideas; agents research, draft, and manage publication schedules 12.2.6 Monitor and analyse media coverage and public sentiment 762439 h+A — Agents continuously monitor and analyse; humans interpret trends and recommend actions

docs.title: 12.3 Manage Sustainability and ESG Commitments (694217)
docs.text:
Define, execute, and report on the enterprise's environmental, social, and governance commitments — ensuring genuine progress toward sustainability targets and transparent disclosure to stakeholders.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 12.3.1 Define the sustainability strategy and targets 527341 H+a — Humans set ambition and strategy; agents benchmark against industry standards and peer performance 12.3.2 Measure and track environmental impact and carbon footprint 910625 h+A — Agents aggregate emissions data and calculate footprints; humans validate methodology and boundaries 12.3.3 Manage social impact programmes and community engagement 346918 H+a — Humans design programmes and build relationships; agents track metrics and manage logistics 12.3.4 Prepare ESG disclosures and sustainability reports 728154 h+A — Agents compile data and draft reports against frameworks; humans approve and present 12.3.5 Monitor regulatory developments in sustainability reporting 715011 h+A — Agents scan regulatory landscape; humans assess impact and adjust reporting approaches

docs.title: 12.4 Deliver Administrative and Office Services (183742)
docs.text:
Provide the day-to-day administrative services that support enterprise operations — including document management, records retention, office supplies, and general administrative coordination.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 12.4.1 Manage enterprise document and records lifecycle 629481 h+A — Agents classify, tag, store, and apply retention rules; humans set policies and handle exceptions 12.4.2 Operate printing, reprographics, and physical distribution 375218 h+A — Agents manage queues and logistics; humans handle specialised requests 12.4.3 Manage office supplies and consumables procurement 914263 A — Agent-executed; automated reordering based on consumption patterns and thresholds 12.4.4 Coordinate meeting room and resource booking 548371 A — Agent-executed; automated scheduling with conflict resolution and optimisation 12.4.5 Provide executive and departmental administrative support 261849 H=A — Agents manage calendars, prepare briefings, and handle correspondence; humans provide judgement and relationship management

docs.title: 12.5 Operate Shared Services and Service Integration (825463)
docs.text:
Design, operate, and optimise shared service centres and models that consolidate common processes across the enterprise — delivering standardised, cost-effective services at scale.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 12.5.1 Design and evolve the shared services operating model 473219 H+a — Humans design the model; agents benchmark performance and model consolidation scenarios 12.5.2 Manage service catalogues and service-level agreements 618342 H=A — Agents maintain catalogues and track SLA performance; humans negotiate and review agreements 12.5.3 Operate the enterprise service desk and request fulfilment 562521 h+A — Agents handle tier-1 requests and automated fulfilment; humans resolve complex and sensitive cases 12.5.4 Monitor shared service performance and drive improvement 742931 h+A — Agents track KPIs and surface improvement opportunities; humans prioritise and implement changes 12.5.5 Manage vendor and outsourcing relationships for shared services 381547 H+a — Humans manage strategic vendor relationships; agents track performance and contract compliance

docs.title: 12.6 Manage Business Travel and Expense Administration (219643)
docs.text:
Operate the enterprise's travel programme and expense management processes — ensuring policy compliance, cost control, duty of care, and a smooth experience for travellers.

# Process ID Agentic Profile 12.6.1 Define and maintain travel policies and preferred supplier programmes 847312 H+a — Humans set policies; agents benchmark rates and manage supplier catalogues 12.6.2 Process travel requests and itinerary planning 563184 h+A — Agents search, book, and optimise itineraries; humans approve out-of-policy requests 12.6.3 Manage duty of care and traveller safety 418729 H=A — Agents track traveller locations and issue alerts; humans make evacuation and safety decisions 12.6.4 Process expense claims and reimbursements 735261 h+A — Agents validate receipts, check policy, and process payments; humans approve exceptions 12.6.5 Analyse travel spend and optimise the programme 692418 h+A — Agents analyse spend patterns and savings opportunities; humans negotiate and make programme changes
